name: Kodiak Gas Services, Inc.
summary: Part I Overview We are a leading provider and operator of large horsepower contract compression infrastructure in the U.S, supporting the critical movement and processing of natural gas across key production regions. Through our wholly-owned subsidiary, Kodiak Services, formed in 2011, we have built and operated a substantial fleet of high-reliability compression assets for more than a decade. On July 3, 2023, we completed our IPO and our common stock is currently trading on the New York Stock E...
